name: Paynamics
description: Philippine-based payment processor supporting cards, e-wallets, OTC and QR Ph for merchant checkout APIs.

seo.title: Paynamics — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Paynamics: Philippine-based payment processor supporting cards, e-wallets, OTC and QR Ph for merchant checkout APIs.

when_to_use: QR Ph payment acceptance for Philippine online merchants
e-wallet and OTC collection via unified Paynamics API
Card processing integration for Philippine e-commerce checkout

pros: Cards, e-wallets, OTC, QR Ph coverage
cons: Docs clunky and hard to navigate
review.verdict: Safer for PH enterprise who value longevity over DX, but most new builds pick PayMongo instead.
review.best_for: Philippine enterprises needing a mature processor with local compliance track record
review.not_for: API-first startups prioritizing modern developer experience
